'''鈭歮-g-dh''' ('''magadha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:teaspoon|teaspoon]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-g-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:teaspoon|teaspoon]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歮-g-dh
|-
! Lemma
| magadha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:magadhithi|magadhithi]] || [[word:magadhiji|magadhiji]] || [[word:magadhishi|magadhishi]] || [[word:magadhi|magadhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:magadhuthuth|magadhuthuth]] || [[word:magadhujuj|magadhujuj]] || [[word:magadhushush|magadhushush]] || [[word:magadh|magadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:magadhuthu|magadhuthu]] || [[word:magadhuju|magadhuju]] || [[word:magadhushu|magadhushu]] || [[word:magadhu|magadhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:magadhufuth|magadhufuth]] || [[word:magadhufuj|magadhufuj]] || [[word:magadhufush|magadhufush]] || [[word:magadhuf|magadhuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:magadhethe|magadhethe]] || [[word:magadheje|magadheje]] || [[word:magadheshe|magadheshe]] || [[word:magadhe|magadhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:magadhothoth|magadhothoth]] || [[word:magadhojoj|magadhojoj]] || [[word:magadhoshosh|magadhoshosh]] || [[word:magadh|magadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:magadhotho|magadhotho]] || [[word:magadhojo|magadhojo]] || [[word:magadhosho|magadhosho]] || [[word:magadho|magadho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:magadhofoth|magadhofoth]] || [[word:magadhofoj|magadhofoj]] || [[word:magadhofosh|magadhofosh]] || [[word:magadhof|magadhof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:magadh忙th忙|magadh忙th忙]] || [[word:magadh忙j忙|magadh忙j忙]] || [[word:magadh忙sh忙|magadh忙sh忙]] || [[word:magadh忙|magadh忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:magadhathath|magadhathath]] || [[word:magadhajaj|magadhajaj]] || [[word:magadhashash|magadhashash]] || [[word:magadh|magadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:magadhatha|magadhatha]] || [[word:magadhaja|magadhaja]] || [[word:magadhasha|magadhasha]] || [[word:magadha|magadha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:magadhafath|magadhafath]] || [[word:magadhafaj|magadhafaj]] || [[word:magadhafash|magadhafash]] || [[word:magadhaf|magadhaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:magadhasha|magadhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gomagadhasha|gomagadhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokimagadhasha|gokimagadhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:magadhn眉sha|magadhn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gomagadhnkn眉sha|gomagadhnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokimagadhn眉sha|gokimagadhn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:magadhsh毛sha|magadhsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomagadhnksh毛sha|gomagadhnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokimagadhsh毛sha|gokimagadhsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:magadhrosha|magadhrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomagadhnkrosha|gomagadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokimagadhrosha|gokimagadhrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:magadhmusha|magadhmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gomagadhnkmusha|gomagadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimagadhmusha|gokimagadhmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:magadhsherasha|magadhsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gomagadhnksherasha|gomagadhnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokimagadhsherasha|gokimagadhsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:magadhngasha|magadhngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gomagadhnkngasha|gomagadhnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokimagadhngasha|gokimagadhngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:magadhyasha|magadhyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gomagadhnkyasha|gomagadhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokimagadhyasha|gokimagadhyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:magadhyamasha|magadhyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gomagadhnkyamasha|gomagadhnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokimagadhyamasha|gokimagadhyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:magadhn眉sh毛sha|magadhn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gomagadhnkn眉sh毛sha|gomagadhnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokimagadhn眉sh毛sha|gokimagadhn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:magadhn眉rosha|magadhn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomagadhnkn眉rosha|gomagadhnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokimagadhn眉rosha|gokimagadhn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:magadhn眉musha|magadhn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomagadhnkn眉musha|gomagadhnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimagadhn眉musha|gokimagadhn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:magadhsh毛n眉sha|magadhsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gomagadhnksh毛n眉sha|gomagadhnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokimagadhsh毛n眉sha|gokimagadhsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:magadhsh毛rosha|magadhsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomagadhnksh毛rosha|gomagadhnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokimagadhsh毛rosha|gokimagadhsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:magadhsh毛musha|magadhsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomagadhnksh毛musha|gomagadhnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimagadhsh毛musha|gokimagadhsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:magadhron眉sha|magadhron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gomagadhnkron眉sha|gomagadhnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokimagadhron眉sha|gokimagadhron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:magadhrosh毛sha|magadhrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gomagadhnkrosh毛sha|gomagadhnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokimagadhrosh毛sha|gokimagadhrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:magadhromusha|magadhromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomagadhnkromusha|gomagadhnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimagadhromusha|gokimagadhromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:magadhmun眉sha|magadhmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gomagadhnkmun眉sha|gomagadhnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokimagadhmun眉sha|gokimagadhmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:magadhmush毛sha|magadhmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gomagadhnkmush毛sha|gomagadhnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokimagadhmush毛sha|gokimagadhmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:magadhmurosha|magadhmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomagadhnkmurosha|gomagadhnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokimagadhmurosha|gokimagadhmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:magadh|magadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:m忙g忙dh|m忙g忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:homagadh|homagadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hom忙g忙dh|hom忙g忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohomagadh|hohomagadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohom忙g忙dh|hohom忙g忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉magadh|n眉magadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉m忙g忙dh|n眉m忙g忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉magadh|n眉n眉magadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉m忙g忙dh|n眉n眉m忙g忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂magadh|n茂magadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂m忙g忙dh|n茂m忙g忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂magadh|n茂n茂magadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂m忙g忙dh|n茂n茂m忙g忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lumagadh|lumagadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lum忙g忙dh|lum忙g忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulumagadh|lulumagadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulum忙g忙dh|lulum忙g忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:limagadh|limagadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lim忙g忙dh|lim忙g忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilimagadh|lilimagadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilim忙g忙dh|lilim忙g忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:komagadh|komagadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kom忙g忙dh|kom忙g忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokomagadh|kokomagadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokom忙g忙dh|kokom忙g忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kemagadh|kemagadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kem忙g忙dh|kem忙g忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekemagadh|kekemagadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekem忙g忙dh|kekem忙g忙dh]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|06f9dc6}}
